data.title: Miao Edits Texts
data.statement:
Miao is editing texts only to contain every <<THIRD>> word starting from the first word
(word number 1, 4, 7...). If there is trailing whitespace at the end, Miao wants to remove it.

testCases.title: Extra Symbols
testCases.testIn: don't confuse java and javascript folks!

testCases.title: Validator 2
testCases.testIn: d' c+ j. a* j^ f...

testCases.title: More Symbols
testCases.testIn: ruby is a mineral and it is also a coding language that you can use! ! ! ! !

testCases.title: Validator 3
testCases.testIn: R iiiiiiiiiiii a m a i i a a c l TTTTTTTTTTTTT y c U! !! !! !! !!!!!

testCases.title: More Whitespace
testCases.testIn: blank  space  double  bug  what  happens?

data.inputDescription: <<Line 1:>> A string [[string]] which is read and modified to leave every third word starting from word number 1. Remove whitespace at the end of the string.
data.outputDescription: A single line containing the modified string.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Miao is editing texts only to contain every THIRD word starting from the first word
(word number 1, 4, 7...). If there is trailing whitespace at the end, Miao wants to remove it.
Input
Line 1: A string string which is read and modified to leave every third word starting from word number 1. Remove whitespace at the end of the string.
Output
A single line containing the modified string.
Constraints
Example
Input
Take two of these
Output
Take these
